update_granularity: PPO updates every 5 slots by default; Bandit updates every 10 slots by default.

estimated_convergence.ppo_gnn_epochs: about 200-500 epochs for stable curves; 50-100 epochs for a quick sanity trend
estimated_convergence.bandit_epochs: about 30-80 epochs for coarse arm preference; 100-200 epochs for steadier UCB statistics
